Placement: LinkedIn sponsored feed image
Required canvas: 1200 x 627 px
Required aspect ratio: 1.91:1 horizontal
Outer safe margin: 60 px for essential copy, logo, and CTA.
Headline limit: maximum 2 lines in the left copy column.
Minimum readable type: product name 30 px, headline 54 px, supporting line 28 px, CTA 28 px.
Logo: current horizontal wordmark or folded-path mark in the top-right safe area.
CTA: lower-left safe area, aligned to the copy column.
Hero: right or center-right UI panel, secondary to the headline.
Contrast rule: if the background under text is bright or busy, use a deep green overlay or solid panel behind white text.
This file overrides older square-social dimensions in archive brand material.
